task_id.title: Task Id

valid_from.description: The UNIX timestamp when this memory became true.

valid_to.description: The UNIX timestamp when this memory was invalidated.
valid_to.title: Valid To

interval_type.description: The Allen's interval algebra or causal relationship classification.

checkpoint_id.description: Unique identifier for the temporal anchor.
checkpoint_id.title: Checkpoint Id

ledger_index.description: The exact array index in the EpistemicLedger this checkpoint represents.
ledger_index.title: Ledger Index

state_hash.description: The canonical RFC 8785 SHA-256 hash of the entire topology at this exact index.
state_hash.title: State Hash

cwd.description: The current working directory of the terminal environment.
cwd.title: Cwd

stdout_buffer.description: The buffered standard output captured from execution.
stdout_buffer.title: Stdout Buffer

last_exit_code.description: The exit code of the last executed command, if any.
last_exit_code.title: Last Exit Code

ToolDefinition.description: Declarative mathematical definition of a tool.

tool_name.description: The exact identifier of the tool.
tool_name.title: Tool Name

description.description: Semantic description of what the tool does, used by the LLM for selection.
description.title: Description

input_schema.description: The strict JSON Schema dictionary defining the required arguments.
input_schema.title: Input Schema

side_effects.description: The declarative side-effect and idempotency profile of the tool.

permissions.description: The zero-trust security boundaries for the tool's execution.

batch_id.description: Unique identifier for this telemetry snapshot.
batch_id.title: Batch Id

spans.description: A collection of execution spans to be serialized.
spans.title: Spans

dimensionality.description: The size of the vector array.
dimensionality.title: Dimensionality

model_name.description: The provenance of the embedding model used (e.g., 'text-embedding-3-large').
model_name.title: Model Name

WorkflowEnvelope.description: The root envelope for an orchestrated workflow payload.

manifest_version.description: The semantic version of this workflow manifestation schema.

topology.description: The underlying topology governing execution routing.

governance.description: Macro-economic circuit breakers and TTL limits for the swarm.

system_prompt.description: The active system prompt guiding the agent's behavior.
system_prompt.title: System Prompt

active_context.description: A dictionary representing the active context variables for the agent.

argumentation.description: The formal graph of non-monotonic claims and defeasible attacks currently active in the swarm's working memory.
